rationale: Review 1's approve is correct under generality: the core descent proof, sqrtTower (ℕ+ Iio), and derived Fin/Fintype/rational variants in the diff are appropriately general (no superfluous assumptions; induction on n is the natural core; Fintype wrappers add no duplication), matching the rubric and provenance. Review 2's requested refactors (reverse derivation order, change primary theorem/indexing, rewrite carrier quantifiers) are ungrounded preferences that would not improve generality and could only add mechanical boilerplate or obscure the inductive structure.
